markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project status and pivot CS101 content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**CVE publishing is paused for \~2 weeks** due to a code freeze for an Algolia search fix. Phase 2 will start after the freeze is lifted.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**CS101 strategy will expand** to new pillars (Wayfinder services, Prompt Security, Observo) to create clear content lanes and avoid cannibalization.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [**CS101 workflow will be streamlined** by keeping reviews in Google Docs and automating the final push to ContentStack, which is unaffected by the code freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [**Three PMM-reviewed CS101 articles** (`Software Supply Chain Security`, `Malware vs. Virus`, `Infrastructure as a Service`) are ready for publication by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Topics

### CVE Pages: Code Freeze & Publishing Pause

  - [**Problem:** The current search function is failing with the new volume of CVE pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [**Solution:** The web team is implementing Algolia search to support thousands of entries.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [**Impact → Code Freeze:** All publishing and website code changes are paused for \~2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=742.0)
      - [**Exception:** George can fix minor (P3/P4) design bugs.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**Revised Phase 2 Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Status:** Paused until the freeze is lifted.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
      - [**New Workflow:** GrowthX pushes content to ContentStack → SentinelOne web team publishes.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [**Cadence:** GrowthX will push in batches of \~200 entries on Mondays for Tuesday publication.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
      - [**Action:** Ankit will identify a SentinelOne web team contact for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)

### CVE Pages: Process Improvements

  - [**GitHub → Airtable Integration:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate pulling new CVEs from GitHub into Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya to file a Linear ticket for Marcus to assist with the setup next week.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [**Airtable Enhancements:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Request:** Add columns for live URLs and publish dates.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will add columns and investigate automation to avoid manual entry.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [**New 2025 CVE Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [**Cadence:** Push new CVEs on Wednesdays to separate them from the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1210.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya will update the Airtable plan with revised dates and volume projections.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)

### CS101: New Content Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Finding high-volume keywords for the current AI pillars without cannibalizing existing content is difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1462.0)
  - [**Solution → Expand Content Pillars:** Ankit approved new content lanes to create clear opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
      - [**1. Wayfinder Services:** SentinelOne's rebranded services arm.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
          - [**Focus Areas:** Threat Hunting, MDR, Incident Readiness & Response.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**2. Acquisitions:** Create content on Prompt Security and Observo offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
          - [**Rationale:** This content is currently missing from SentinelOne's site.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [**Content Refreshes:** The team will revisit a prior report on refresh opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
      - [**Action:** Katya to share the report with Ankit for review.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### CS101: Workflow & Content Updates

  - [**Workflow Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
      - [**Decision:** Keep PMM reviews in Google Docs for better collaboration and to feed comments into the AI pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
      - [**Action:** Marcus to build an automation to push final content from Google Docs to ContentStack (est. 1-day effort).](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [**Content Status:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [**New Content:** 4 revisions and new agentic pipeline articles are due by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [**PMM-Reviewed Articles:** 3 articles are ready for publication by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
          - [`Software Supply Chain Security`](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
          - [`Malware vs. Virus`](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
          - [`Infrastructure as a Service`](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
      - [**Action:** Mansi to resolve comments and publish. Katya to track URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

  - [**Mansi:**](https://fathom.video/share/9fEJyMtDKAf8oSu5nXGCisRY3UEQsRJC?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
